overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character running through the Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco at night. The character moves along the lagoon, enters the illuminated colonnade with massive classical columns, passes through the rotunda interior, and continues along the exterior promenade with other pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: lagoon-side path with illuminated classical columns

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the lagoon path with the illuminated Palace of Fine Arts columns on the right

entered.detail: calm reflective water body running parallel to the pathway
row of tall classical stone columns with warm uplighting
small ground-level lamps illuminating the dirt path
warm-lit structures visible across the lagoon

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a dirt path beside a calm lagoon at night, with the illuminated classical columns of the Palace of Fine Arts dominating the right side. Pathway lights dot the route, and distant buildings glow across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of classical colonnade with massive stone columns

events.description: character turns inward and enters the Palace of Fine Arts colonnade from the lagoon path

agents.ego_description: running beneath the massive columns into the covered interior space of the monument

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing walking ahead through the columned passage

entered.detail: large domed structure with ornate detailing visible through the columns
open paved area surrounded by the colonnade structure
mature trees growing within the interior courtyard space

segments.scene_description: The character enters the semi-covered colonnade, running between massive illuminated stone columns toward the grand rotunda. The space transitions from open lagoon-side to sheltered interior courtyard with trees and other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior promenade transitioning from rotunda interior

events.description: exits the covered colonnade area into the open exterior plaza with park benches

agents.ego_description: running through the interior courtyard and exiting to the exterior promenade, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: white painted benches lining the exterior pathway
urban residential and commercial buildings adjacent to the park
mature trees with dense canopies lining the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the rotunda interior and exits to an exterior promenade lined with benches and street trees. The grand rotunda recedes to the left as urban buildings become visible on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban promenade with benches and street furniture

agents.ego_description: continuing along the exterior pathway past benches and street lamps with other pedestrians nearby

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and shorts jogging in the same direction

entered.detail: tall black bollard lights illuminating the pathway
white rectangular trash receptacles along the building wall
parked carriage with horse near the palace entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the exterior promenade where the palace columns recede into the distance on the right. The path features benches, street lamps, and trash bins along urban buildings on the left, with a horse carriage visible near the palace entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene lagoon-side path into the illuminated classical architecture of the Palace of Fine Arts and finally out toward an urban promenade. It begins with the character running along a dirt path beside a calm lagoon, where glowing pathway lights and distant buildings frame the massive columns to the right. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open waterfront into the sheltered colonnade, passing between towering stone pillars toward the grand rotunda and a courtyard filled with trees and pedestrians. The camera then glides through the rotunda interior and exits onto an exterior promenade, where the classical structure recedes to the left as city buildings emerge. Finally, the path opens further along the promenade, passing benches and street lamps while a horse carriage appears near the palace entrance in the distance.
